name: apple-passwords
title: Apple Password
description: Search Apple Passwords and copy passwords or one-time codes from your local vault.
author: alec-harmon

commands.name: apw
commands.title: Search Passwords
commands.subtitle: Apple Password
commands.description: Search Apple Passwords and copy passwords or one-time codes

commands.name: clear-cache
commands.title: Clear Password Cache
commands.subtitle: Apple Password
commands.description: Delete the local Apple Password cache file

scripts.test:
node --import tsx --test $(find src/test -name '*.test.ts' -type f | sort | tr '
' ' ')
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
